sources.name: Anthropic Skills
evidence: Canonical reference implementation of the Agent Skills open standard
Contains skills/*/SKILL.md files with standard frontmatter format
159k stars, 18.8k forks, 43 commits
Diverse skill categories: Creative & Design, Development & Technical, Enterprise & Communication, Document Skills
Includes the Agent Skills specification under spec/
sources.notes: Highest-authority source for the Agent Skills ecosystem. Document skills are source-available but not open source.

sources.name: Microsoft Agent Skills
evidence: Contains 175+ skills in .github/skills/*/SKILL.md format
Covers Azure SDK, Foundry, MCP, custom agents, AGENTS.md templates
2.7k stars, 304 forks, 662 commits
Multi-language skills: Python, .NET, TypeScript, Java, Rust
Includes test harness with 1169 test scenarios across 129 skills

license.evidence: LICENSE file at repo root, MIT

sources.notes: Largest single-vendor skill collection. Enterprise/cloud focused.

sources.name: Addy Osmani Agent Skills
evidence: Contains 24 skills in skills/*/SKILL.md format
Production-grade engineering skills: spec-driven-development, TDD, code review, CI/CD, security
71.3k stars, 7.7k forks, 308 commits
8 slash commands mapping to full development lifecycle
Includes agent personas, reference checklists, hooks

license.evidence: LICENSE file at repo root, MIT

sources.activity: actively maintained (308 commits, latest release 0.6.3 Jul 2026)
sources.notes: Highest-quality engineering workflow skills. Opinionated Google engineering culture patterns.

sources.name: VoltAgent Awesome Agent Skills
evidence: Curated collection of 1000+ agent skills from official dev teams and community
27.5k stars, 2.9k forks, 406 commits
Includes skills from Anthropic, Google, Vercel, Stripe, Cloudflare, Netlify, Figma, Expo, Hugging Face, Trail of Bits, Sentry, etc.
README.md lists skills with links to source repos
sources.notes: This is an awesome-list index, not a direct skill repo. It points to external repos. Valuable as a discovery source for future expansion.

sources.name: ComposioHQ Awesome Claude Skills
evidence: Curated list of 1000+ Claude Skills and Plugins
67k stars, 7.5k forks, 75 commits
README.md lists skills with links to source repos
Includes some direct SKILL.md folders in the repo (changelog-generator, connect-apps, etc.)
sources.notes: Primarily an awesome-list index. Contains some direct skills but most are pointers. Valuable as a discovery source for future expansion.

sources.name: YUV.AI Agent Skills
evidence: Contains skills in skills/*/SKILL.md format
16 skills focused on creative production: video editing, presentations, landing pages, design systems
243 stars, 58 forks, 73 commits
Well-structured SKILL.md files with workflows
sources.notes: Heavily branded around one creator's design system. Creative/media-focused skills.

sources.name: Awesome Claude Code and Skills (GetBindu)
evidence: Curated README list of skills and tools
160 stars, 94 forks, 186 commits
README.md is a link directory — no SKILL.md files in the repo

license.evidence: LICENSE file exists but content not inspected

sources.notes: Rejected: contains no direct skill artifacts. Pure link directory.

sources.name: Awesome Agent Skills (heilcheng)
evidence: Curated directory of agent skills and links
5.9k stars, 543 forks, 117 commits
README.md is a link directory — no SKILL.md files in the repo
sources.notes: Rejected: contains no direct skill artifacts. Pure link directory. Multi-language READMEs.
